title: Senior Instructional Designer at LinkedIn Learning India

jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at LinkedIn Learning India
jsonLd.description:
LinkedIn Learning India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LinkedIn Learning India:
LinkedIn Learning India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LinkedIn Learning India!
